name: Insight Meditation Center
description: The Insight Meditation Center (IMC) in Redwood City, California, is a community-based center offering teachings in the Theravada Buddhist tradition. Founded by Gil Fronsdal, IMC offers daily meditation sittings, weekly dharma talks, daylong retreats, and classes on mindfulness, ethics, and Buddhist psychology. The center operates on a dana (generosity) basis, making teachings freely available to all. IMC serves as a hub for the Bay Area's vibrant Vipassana community.
